name: jdy_query_my_tasks
description_zh: 查询指定成员的流程待办列表
description: Query a user's pending workflow tasks (待办). Requires username. Returns task list with task_id, app_id, form_id, instance_id, flow_node info, assignee, and creator. Use skip/limit for pagination. Rate limit: 30/s.

username.description: 要查询待办的成员username（必填）
